feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP CPI Max connection limit
entry.content:
One of our processes is generating about a 1000 IDocs through RSEOUT and calling CPI to send the information to a 3PL application. What we are seeing is about 600 of those IDocs reach CPI and get processed successfully and the remaining 400 IDocs end up in Status 02 status indicating it couldn't connect to CPI. We don't even see them in CPI. 

Does anyone know if there is a max CONCURRENT connecting limit in a CPI tenant and how to have it updated?

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Fetching data from sender's mail
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m trying to fetch specific data from the incoming emails since that’s where the info will be coming from, so that i can extract some specific texts and convert them into an xml for some other uses. I'm struggling with fetching specific data and parsing the results in an XML format, the sender mail adapter is well configured i can receive the mails, i tried using content modifier to read the message and store the data but got struggled with the message headers/message body not ending up us an XML format.

this is the iFlow so far ;

 and this is the exemple of the wanted results ;

entry.title: Sending Customers (t-code BD12) to BTP integration suite (SCPI) fails with MDG error
entry.content:
Hi,

Im trying to send customer data via Integration suite to SAP Commerce. 

I have a recent S/4hana trial version. I managed to send MATMAS(products), COND_A (prices) and now im trying to replicate DEBMAS. However when I try to send the data I receive following error:

The current IDoc is related to a customer. Possible IDoc types are:
DEBMAS for customer data
ADRMAS for customer address data
ADR2MAS or ADR3MAS for the customer's contact person address
DOLMAS for the customer's document links

Your system is configured for using SAP Master Governance for Customers. The related business functions and switches are active. This requires DRF Customizing for the client system BTPSCPI. The same is not configured. The IDoc processing cannot continue and is terminated with a short dump.

I tried to follow up with https://me.sap.com/notes/2363365 however I m not able to find all the options described in the note. For example the BTP integration suite is not maintained as Business System not the SAP Commerce as thats a trail.

Is there any option to configure DFR and send DEBMAS data from S/4hana to BTP Integration Suite (former SCPI).

entry.title: SAP BTP CPI - AMQP Adapter
entry.content: How to use AMQP adapter in between an iFlow . I need to read messages from queue every 15 minutes ,so have a timer which is scheduled to run every 15 minutes . But I am not able to read messages from queue in between an iFlow using OOTB components

entry.title: Advanced Event Mesh or APIM when to use what?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The business requirement is as follows:-  when ever something changes to material (or) new material gets created then the details like quantity, price etc, to be sent to partner system.

We are in initial discussion on what to use when among Advanced Event Mesh(AEM) or APIM?

Does AEM makes sense only in case of Asynchronous publish subscribe model?

End to end message flow would be something like below.

SAP SRM -> BTP app -> Partner system.

 Can you recommend what to use when among AEM or APIM or API?

KR,

Ramu

entry.title: Integrate Jira with SAP CPI - Create Jira ticket via SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to integrate with the Jira to create a ticket/issue via SAP CPI to reduce the usage of the third part tool which does the same thing. 

I have referred the below blogs and tried to create a sample IFlow in the sap cpi but unfortunately, I am unable to proceed further due to the error encountered which states as below. 

The Jira Cloud platform REST API (atlassian.com)

org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking https://<hostname>/rest/api/2/issue/ with statusCode: 415

FYI, I am able to get the details of the existing ticket but unable to create the ticket via CPI. But managed to create the ticket via POSTMAN.

Sample IFLow.

 

Payload used:

{
"fields": {
"project": {
"key": "SDC"
},
"summary": "Demo ticket from the CPI via API",
"issuetype": {
"name": "Task"
},
"description": "PLEASE IGNORE THIS ISSUE TICKET",
"assignee": {
"name": "Imran"
},
"labels": [
"Demo"
]
}
}

Please advice on this. Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Send csv file from CPI to Microsoft Teams
entry.content:
Hey Experts ; 

I want to Send csv file from CPI to Microsoft Teams. Is it possible and is there any way to do that❓

entry.title: Ariba Sender Adapter in Cloud Integration not fetching Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have a requirement to integrate Ariba supplier portal with SAP via Cloud Integration. There are 2 scenarios

1. Fetch orders from Ariba supplier portal and send to SAP ECC
2. Post invoices from SAP ECC to Ariba Supplier portal

We are using Ariba adapter in both the scenarios.

For posting invoices, I am able to do that using Ariba receiver adapter and invoice is reflecting in Ariba supplier portal. But while fetching orders using Ariba sender adapter, the iFlow is in Completed status but no orders are being pulled and there is no error in Message Monitoring.

I would like to know if anyone has used Ariba sender adapter to pull Purchase orders from Ariba portal and faced similar issue.

Thank you
Lekshmi

entry.title: Unable to open Integration Suite application
entry.content:
Hi, 

After assigning the role, when I click on Go to Application on Integration suite, I am getting the below page. Tried multiple by clearing the caches and with other browsers, but still the same error. Please help me on this.

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Best Approach for Master Data Integration from SuccessFactors(SF) to S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are planning to implement master data integration from SuccessFactors(SF) to S/4 HANA Public Cloud. I would like to know the best approach for this integration. specifically

1. Should we use SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) or SAP Master Data Integration (MDI) for this purpose?

2. Are there any additional recommended tools or services required to facilitate this integration

From My Research, I found that SAP MDI is often recommended for such integrations. also I found there are no standard Cost center and Organizational integration in SAP CPI for S4 HANA Public Cloud.

There is Standard I-flow for Employee Data Replication in SAP CPI but as per below post it should be used if our SAP S/4 HANA CLOUD is below 2308 Release. 

Link to the blog : Integrate SAP S4 HANA Cloud/on-premise with Succes... - SAP Community

However, I came across another blog that mentioned MDI is Moved to ABAP Adapter concept.

Link to the blog : Configuring the replication of Cost Centers from S... - SAP Community

Any insights, experiences, or updated information on this would be greatly appreciated,

Thankyou,

Anil

SAP Integration Suite  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Master Data  SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Error while processing Proxy request in soap to proxy interface in Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am currently testing a soap to proxy scenario for which I'm getting an error 'org.apache.cxf.binding.soap.SoapFault: Error during conversion of XI message'. I have also found a detailed error after enabling the trace:

<detail><SAP:Error xmlns:SAP="http://sap.com/xi/XI/Message/30" xmlns:SOAP="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" SOAP:mustUnderstand="1"><SAP:Category>XIProtocol</SAP:Category><SAP:Code area="PARSER">UNEXPECTED_VALUE</SAP:Code><SAP:P1>Main/@versionMinor</SAP:P1><SAP:P2>001</SAP:P2><SAP:P3>000</SAP:P3><SAP:P4/><SAP:AdditionalText/><SAP:ApplicationFaultMessage namespace=""/><SAP:Stack>XML tag Main/@versionMinor has the incorrect value 001. Value 000 expected </SAP:Stack></SAP:Error></detail>

 

Can anyone please let me know why this below error is generated and how this can be resolved.

Thanks,

Aditya

entry.title: Handling bulk EDI documents from trading partners.
entry.content:
Hello All

I have a requirement where in our partner currently sends invoices (810) in EDI X12 format. These invoices come in bulk, meaning several invoices are bundled together in one single EDI file. Our current B2B system has the capability to split them and convert them into individual IDOC's. Can I achieve this using BTP (Cloud Integration). After some searching, I came across the documentation for EDI splitter. Can EDI splitter be the solution to accomplish this use case. Can this be used to handle incoming invoices in bulk. 

Have anyone tried this scenario using the BTP cloud integration. Please share your thoughts. 

Thank You.

Vijhay D.

entry.title: PATCH ODATA API call to update UserLockedIndicator Field in Entityset BusinessUserCollection in C4C
entry.content:
I want to use ODATA Receiver Adapter to update the value of a field called UserLockedIndicator to true. For this purpose, I need to invoke Entity BusinessUserCollection in C4C. ObjectID is Key field for it which i have already read using GET operation in previous step. Now I want to use this Object ID from Exchange property of last Content modifier and make a PATCH call.

XML Payload in previous Content modifier Body = 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<entry xml:base="https://my362199.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom" xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
<category term="c4codata.BusinessUser" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
<content type="application/xml">
<m:properties>
<d:UserLockedIndicator>true</d:UserLockedIndicator>
</m:properties>
</content>
</entry>

I am getting error in IFlow for ODATA receiver adapter = com.thoughtworks.xstream.security.ForbiddenClassException: java.util.Map$Entry

entry.title: Facing issue to send the data to the receiver in a single file
entry.content:
Facing issue to send the data to the receiver in a single file after fetching the large data in chunks using pagination from S/4 Hana cloud's OData API.


Hello Experts,
 We are facing an issue with fetching large data from an OData API in small chunks using pagination.
Although the data is fetched correctly in chunks, we have observed that only the data from the last page is being passed from the local integration process to the main integration process, where we are sending the data to the SFTP receiver.

 

If we add the Receiver in the local Integration process, it is sending all the pages data to the receiver but as separate files.

 

Expectation: To send all the data in a single file to the Receiver.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Nagendra Hada

 

 

  • best practices odata
  • CPI
  • integration
  • OData
  • orchestration

entry.title: Missing custom header in a ProcessDirect stream
entry.content:
hi community,


I am trying to configure in a content modifier inside message header some constants, which I would like to be able to read later when I call up another stream with the ProcessDirect connector.

I have created two streams, the first:

 

which has a timer and a content modifier with two headers set, and the ProcessDirect connection.

The second one:

with a content modifier that tries to take the two headers passed from the previous stream.

From the deployment you can see that the headers are not present, so how do I pass headers/properties from one stream to another when using ProcessDirect?

Thank you

entry.title: Checking Retry Count at Runtime in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need some help regarding retries in SAP Cloud Integration. Is it possible to determine the current retry count at runtime? I would like to implement a mechanism that aborts a message after, for example, 10 unsuccessful processing attempts.

For JMS, there's the header field header.SAPJMSRetries, but I'm not aware of an equivalent for Kafka. Is there a way to achieve this in a more generic manner? While I know this can be done via the MPL API, I am interested in knowing if there is a direct method to access the retry count.

Thanks in advance for your assistance!

Regards Florian

entry.title: Getting "Vocab validation failed" for URI error
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

We are sending JSON data to an on-premise oDATA v4 service from CPI but getting the below error. We tried manipulating the payload, headers, URL etc. but nothing seems to work.

Could someone help with the root cause of this issue?

"org.apache.camel.RuntimeCamelException: com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.exceptions.OData4Exception: Vocab validation failed for URI: http://<virtualhost:port>/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_COMMON',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value, cause: com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.exception.ODataProcessingException: Vocab validation failed for URI:"

entry.title: How to change a value in Idoc flat file in SAP CPI?
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to change the data value at multiple places in IDOC flat file in Iflow in CPI.

E.g. 'E2EDL456' to 'E2EDL455'

Please suggest how it can be done using groovy script without changing the file format and also via converting to XML.

SAP Integration Suite #

entry.title: [CPI-Groovy]: Compare Integer and remove XML node
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Requirement is to compare the dates, if the difference more than the specified days we need to discard the particular XML node for further processing. I have written groovy scripts for the same. Not sure why it is not working.

Any help or suggestions would be highly appreciated. 

Parameters:

interfaceLastRunTime = 2024-06-01T00:00:00
effDateDiff = 60
ManualRun= Yes
golive_date = 
Manual_Delta_LSRD = 2024-06-01T00:00:00
end_dt = 2024-07-31T00:00:00

 Groovy Script:

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import groovy.util.XmlSlurper;
import groovy.xml.MarkupBuilder;
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil;
import java.util.Date;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.Calendar;
import groovy.time.TimeCategory;
import java.util.GregorianCalendar;

def Message processData(Message message) {

    def body = message.getBody(java.io.Reader);
    def payload = new XmlSlurper().parse(body);

    map = message.getProperties();
    def lsrd = map.get("interfaceLastRunTime");
    int effDateDiff = map.get("effDateDiff").toInteger();
    def manual_run = map.get("ManualRun");
    golive_date = map.get("golive_date");
    Manual_Delta_LSRD = map.get("Manual_Delta_LSRD");
    end_dt = map.get("end_dt");
    
	if(lsrd == null || lsrd == "")
    {
       if(Manual_Delta_LSRD == null || Manual_Delta_LSRD == "")
    	{
        	lsrd = golive_date;
    	}
		lsrd = Manual_Delta_LSRD;
    }
    lsrd = lsrd.substring(0, 19);
    SimpleDateFormat sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("ddMMyyyy");
    SimpleDateFormat sdtf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"); 

    payload.Row.each {r ->
       def pid = r.PID.text();
       def jobinfo_stdt = r.jobinfo_stdt.text()
       
       if(jobinfo_stdt != null && jobinfo_stdt != "")
       {
           Date new_jobinfo_stdt = sdf.parse(jobinfo_stdt);
           Date new_LSRD = sdtf.parse(lsrd); 
           
            int dateDiffInDays = new_LSRD - new_jobinfo_stdt;
            dateDiffInDays=dateDiffInDays.toInteger()+1
            println dateDiffInDays
            println effDateDiff
           if(dateDiffInDays >= effDateDiff )
           {
               r.replaceNode{}
            //message.setBody(dateDiffInDays.toString())
            }
       }
    }       
    message.setBody(XmlUtil.serialize(payload));
    return message;
}

XML Input:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Records>
	<Row>
		<ACTION>CHANGE</ACTION>
		<PID>M123456</PID>
		<Last_Name/>
		<Last_Name_previous/>
		<First_Name/>
		<First_Name_previous/>
		<salutation/>
		<Gender/>
		<jobinfo_stdt>06042024</jobinfo_stdt>
		<jobinfo_stdt_previous/>
		<event>5</event>
		<event_previous/>
		<emplStatus>T</emplStatus>
		<FullPartTimeInd>true</FullPartTimeInd>
		<Permanent_Temporary>R</Permanent_Temporary>
		<recurring>
			<recurring_stdt>07052024</recurring_stdt>
			<recurring_value>1234</recurring_value>
			<recurring_value_previous/>
			<recurring_code>1111</recurring_code>
		</recurring>
		<recurring>
			<recurring_stdt>06042024</recurring_stdt>
			<recurring_value>42123</recurring_value>
			<recurring_value_previous/>
			<recurring_code>2222</recurring_code>
		</recurring>
	</Row>
	<Row>
		<ACTION>CHANGE</ACTION>
		<PID>M654321</PID>
		<Last_Name/>
		<Last_Name_previous/>
		<First_Name/>
		<First_Name_previous/>
		<salutation/>
		<Gender/>
		<jobinfo_stdt>07042023</jobinfo_stdt>
		<jobinfo_stdt_previous/>
		<event>5</event>
		<event_previous/>
		<emplStatus>T</emplStatus>
		<FullPartTimeInd>true</FullPartTimeInd>
		<Permanent_Temporary>R</Permanent_Temporary>
		<recurring>
			<recurring_stdt>07052024</recurring_stdt>
			<recurring_value>1234</recurring_value>
			<recurring_value_previous/>
			<recurring_code>1111</recurring_code>
		</recurring>
		<recurring>
			<recurring_stdt>06042024</recurring_stdt>
			<recurring_value>42123</recurring_value>
			<recurring_value_previous/>
			<recurring_code>2222</recurring_code>
		</recurring>
	</Row>
</Records>

Regards,

Pavan

entry.title: cannot able to add capabilities what might be the reason
